title: cardamomum hemisphaericum
intro: Cardamomum hemisphaericum is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae), commonly known as the round cardamom. It is a type of cardamom native to the Western Ghats in India, known for its medicinal properties and aromatic seeds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidant properties. Cardamomum hemisphaericum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other ailments.
